title: Rich Crispy Syrian Meat Kebabs
description: A quick-fix Syrian dish featuring pomegranate and crispy meat, perfect for a low-carb meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the lamb meat, pomegranate molasses, olive oil, salt, black pepper, paprika, garlic powder, and onion powder.
Mix everything together with your hands until just combined.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Thread the meat mixture onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the kebabs for 15 minutes, or until they are crispy on the outside and cooked through.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh parsley and pomegranate seeds.
Temper the kebabs with a squeeze of fresh lemon juice before serving.
